Comment.value: This script arrange all texts in a Package in a contextual order
Called from Start Localisation Package and Start Localisation Title script
It sets the field recordNumberReference in table FAT Text to serial numbers, based on context
This value is later use for easier reference when doing human translations (and perhaps machine translation in the future)

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty ( TF PK Sub header 1::Text )
Not IsEmpty ( TF PK Sub header 2::Text )

Comment.value: Find all chapters with the package as a parent

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty ( TF CH Sub header::Text )
Not IsEmpty ( TF CH Sub header 2::Text )

Comment.value: Find all pages with the chapter as a parent

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty ( TF PG Sub header 1::Text )
Not IsEmpty ( TF PG Sub header 2::Text )

Comment.value: Find all page_items with the page as a parent

Calculation.Text: FAT Block @ Page item::Page item List enabled = 1

Comment.value: Number all other package texts if any were missed - shouldn't be any but in case of.
Find all package texts that are not numbered
Global texts - shall come last in the exported file and have their own number - starting at 1 000 000 + 1
Keep only numbered texts to get the last global text
Set global texts start number to 1 000 000

Calculation.Text: "Successfully set " & $recordNumberReference & " package texts in the contextual order and " & $recordReferenceNumberGlobalTexts & " global texts."
